results.title: Hong Kong Tramways - Schedules and Fares
results.content:
This timetable is published as a guide to the general level of service

Image 36

Adult$3.30
Child (Aged 3 or above and under 12)$1.60
Senior Citizen (Aged 65 or above)$1.50
Monthly Ticket$260.00

 For details on Monthly Ticket, please refer to here;).

Payment Methods
Passengers can pay the fares via electronic payment platforms, with Octopus cards or in cash when disembarking from the front exit of the tram. No change is available on board. Passengers using cash for payment should deposit it directly into the coin box. [...] Electronic Payment System
Card payment   VISA
   Mastercard
   UnionPay
   JCB
   American Express
Mobile payment   Apple Pay
   Google Pay (Android)
   SAMSUNG Pay
   HUAWEI Pay
QR code   AlipayHK "EasyGo"
   Alipay "Transit QR Code"
   UnionPay "Transit QR Code"
   BoC Pay "Transit Code"
   Tencent "Transit QR Code" (WeChat Pay)

 Notes:
   AlipayHK "EasyGo" and Alipay "Transit QR Code" mobile apps provide ticket options for adults, children under 12 and senior citizens aged 65 or above; 
   Passengers must use Octopus cards to enjoy tram and KMB designated cross-harbour routes interchange discount;
   Your credit card issuing bank may impose additional charges on cross-border transactions which are not collected by Hong Kong Tramways. You are advised to check with your bank. [...] | Route |  | Mon - Fri | Sat | Sun & P.H. |

| Causeway BayImage 27Shek Tong Tsui | First Tram Last Tram | 05:48 23:32 | 06:25 00:34 | 06:03 00:21 |
| Happy ValleyImage 28Kennedy Town | First Tram Last Tram | 05:45 00:39 | 05:53 00:31 | 05:52 00:37 |
| Shau Kei WanImage 29Kennedy Town | First Tram Last Tram | 07:00 19:10 | 07:00 19:10 | 07:00 19:10 |

# Schedules and Fares

Hong Kong Tramways operates 6 main routes running between Kennedy Town and Shau Kei Wan daily.

*   ![Image 13](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/route_icon.png)The 6 Main Routes

![Image 16](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/navArrow.png)

1.   Western Market Shau Kei Wan
2.   Happy Valley Shau Kei Wan
3.   Shek Tong Tsui North Point
4.   Shek Tong Tsui Causeway Bay
5.   Kennedy Town Happy Valley
6.   Kennedy Town Shau Kei Wan

![Image 23](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/N_icon.png)

| Route |  | Mon - Fri | Sat | Sun & P.H. |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Shau Kei Wan![Image 24](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Western Market | First Tram Last Tram | 05:58 00:06 | 06:01 23:49 | 06:02 23:26 |
| Shau Kei Wan![Image 25](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Happy Valley | First Tram Last Tram | 05:46 22:40 | 05:56 22:31 | 05:56 23:16 |
| North Point![Image 26](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Shek Tong Tsui | First Tram Last Tram | 07:00 19:42 | 07:00 19:42 | 07:00 19:42 |
| Causeway Bay![Image 27](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Shek Tong Tsui | First Tram Last Tram | 05:48 23:32 | 06:25 00:34 | 06:03 00:21 |
| Happy Valley![Image 28](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Kennedy Town | First Tram Last Tram | 05:45 00:39 | 05:53 00:31 | 05:52 00:37 |
| Shau Kei Wan![Image 29](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Kennedy Town* | First Tram Last Tram | 07:00 19:10 | 07:00 19:10 | 07:00 19:10 |

This timetable is published as a guide to the general level of service

Eastbound Route Information and Tram Schedule (the first / last tram's departure time)

| Route |  | Mon - Fri | Sat | Sun & P.H. |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Kennedy Town![Image 30](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Happy Valley | First Tram Last Tram | 05:04 00:00 | 05:12 23:49 | 05:12 23:58 |
| Kennedy Town![Image 31](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Shau Kei Wan* | First Tram Last Tram | 06:40 19:00 | 06:40 19:00 | 06:40 19:00 |
| Shek Tong Tsui![Image 32](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Causeway Bay | First Tram Last Tram | 05:16 22:52 | 05:50 23:58 | 05:30 23:45 |
| Shek Tong Tsui![Image 33](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)North Point | First Tram Last Tram | 06:00 18:30 | 06:00 18:30 | 06:00 18:30 |
| Western Market![Image 34](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Shau Kei Wan | First Tram Last Tram | 05:55 00:00 | 06:00 00:03 | 06:02 00:00 |
| Happy Valley![Image 35](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/tableArrow.png)Shau Kei Wan | First Tram Last Tram | 06:27 23:26 | 06:41 23:16 | 06:42 00:02 |

*From Kennedy Town to Shau Kei Wan: 2 Departures per hour within the service schedule

This timetable is published as a guide to the general level of service

![Image 36](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/title2_en.png)

Adult$3.30
Child (Aged 3 or above and under 12)$1.60
Senior Citizen (Aged 65 or above)$1.50
Monthly Ticket*$260.00

* For details on Monthly Ticket, please refer to [here](javascript:getURL('service-updates-detail/1/1', true, '_self');).

**Payment Methods**
Passengers can pay the fares via electronic payment platforms, with Octopus cards or in cash when disembarking from the front exit of the tram. No change is available on board. Passengers using cash for payment should deposit it directly into the coin box.

**Electronic Payment System**
**Card payment***   VISA
*   Mastercard
*   UnionPay
*   JCB
*   American Express
**Mobile payment***   Apple Pay
*   Google Pay (Android)
*   SAMSUNG Pay
*   HUAWEI Pay
**QR code***   AlipayHK "EasyGo"
*   Alipay "Transit QR Code"
*   UnionPay "Transit QR Code"
*   BoC Pay "Transit Code"
*   Tencent "Transit QR Code" (WeChat Pay)

 Notes:
*   AlipayHK "EasyGo" and Alipay "Transit QR Code" mobile apps provide ticket options for adults, children under 12 and senior citizens aged 65 or above; 
*   Passengers must use Octopus cards to enjoy tram and KMB designated cross-harbour routes interchange discount;
*   Your credit card issuing bank may impose additional charges on cross-border transactions which are not collected by Hong Kong Tramways. You are advised to check with your bank.

![Image 37](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/octopus_icon.png)
Octopus card

![Image 38](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/cash_icon.png)
Cash

![Image 39](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/creditcard_icon.png)
Credit card

![Image 40](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/mobile_payment.png)
Mobile payment

![Image 41](https://www.hktramways.com/images/schedulesFares/qrcode.png)
QR code

![Image 42](https://www.hktramways.com/images/ajax-loader.gif)

results.title: 香港電車 - 叮叮
results.content:
# 叮叮

.jpg)

想知道電車站位置或找出最近的一個？快查看我們的互動路線圖！

.jpg)

電車絕對是一個別具特色的派對場地。立即在網上查詢情況及預訂！

.png)

穿著傳統旗袍，登上1920年代風格的開篷電車，彷彿穿越老香港。

歡迎選購電車紀念品，我們並提供國際全球郵遞服務！

用 Visa 一拍即付，每程減$1\  
\只適用於$3.3車票

成人票價$10或以下，一律收費$2；票價高於$10，可享兩折優惠。

# 最新資訊

|  |  |  |  |
 ---  --- |
| 29.06.2026 |  | 香港中國企業協會舉辦 7.1 - 7.3 慶祝香港特別行政區成立29周年暨中企服務進社區電車免費乘車日 |  |
| 04.12.2025 |  | 二零二六年度電車月票服務 |  |
| 10.11.2025 |  | 「長者咭」或「樂悠咭」持有人免費乘搭普通載客電車 |  |

# Ding Ding

*   [![Image 7](https://www.hktramways.com/images/spacer.gif)](javascript:switchSharePanel();)
*   [![Image 8](https://www.hktramways.com/images/spacer.gif)](javascript:socialMedia('sina', 'https://www.hktramways.com/', 'Hong Kong Tramways - Ding Ding' ,'Find your way around Hong Kong with double-deck trams, the most affordable, convenient and greenest public transport mode in the city. Interactive map, schedules and fares.', 'en');)
*   [![Image 9](https://www.hktramways.com/images/spacer.gif)](javascript:socialMedia('fb', 'https://www.hktramways.com/', 'Hong Kong Tramways - Ding Ding' ,'Find your way around Hong Kong with double-deck trams, the most affordable, convenient and greenest public transport mode in the city. Interactive map, schedules and fares.', 'en');)
*   [![Image 10](https://www.hktramways.com/images/spacer.gif)](javascript:socialMedia('twitter', 'https://www.hktramways.com/', 'Hong Kong Tramways - Ding Ding' ,'Find your way around Hong Kong with double-deck trams, the most affordable, convenient and greenest public transport mode in the city. Interactive map, schedules and fares.', 'en');)

[![Image 11](https://www.hktramways.com/images/home/banner5/Banner_Homepage%20Banner_min.jpeg)](https://www.hktramways.com/download-app/)

*   Special Notice
*   24 Jul 2026

 Both eastbound and westbound tram services between Hoi Foo Street and the Shau Kei Wan Terminus have been fully restored.

*   Interactive Map ![Image 12](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/sectionPhoto1(1).jpg)[](https://www.hktramways.com/hktramways.com/en/interactive-map/)
Want to locate a tram stop or find out the nearest one? Check out on our Interactive Map!  
*   Charter Your Party Tram ![Image 13](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/sectionPhoto3(1).jpg)[](https://www.hktramways.com/hktramways.com/en/book-your-party-tram/)
Party Tram is definitely a unique venue for your next function. Check availability and book online now!  
*   Qipao Pass ![Image 14](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/Qipao%20website%20(432x215px).png)[](https://www.hktramways.com/hktramways.com/en/tramoramic/)
Indulge yourself in OLD HK as you don a Qipao and ride a 1920s-style open-top tram, embracing nostalgic leisure and timeless city charm.  
*   Shop Tram Souvenirs ![Image 15](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/sectionPhoto5.jpg)[](https://www.hktramways.com/hktramways.com/en/tram-souvenirs/)
Buy tram souvenirs which are all available for delivery to customers worldwide!  
*   Visa Promotion ![Image 16](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/432x215Artboard%201.jpg)[](https://www.hktramways.com/hktramways.com/en/visa-on-trams)
Tap to Pay with Visa and enjoy $1* off each ride

 *Applies only to $3.3 tram fares  
*   $2 Scheme ![Image 17](https://www.hktramways.com/media/images/home/%242_TC.jpg)[](https://www.hktramways.com/www.td.gov.hk/en/gov_public_transport_fare_concession/index.html)
For adult fares at $10 or below, only $2 is payable, while an 80% discount applies to adult fares over $10.  

# Service Updates

29.06.2026 The Hong Kong Chinese Enterprises Association launches 7.1 - 7.3 “Celebrating the 29th Anniversary of the Establishment of the HKSAR” Free Tram Ride Days[](javascript:)
04.12.2025 HK Tramways Monthly Tickets for Year 2026[](javascript:)
10.11.2025 Free Regular Passenger Tram Rides for Holders of "Senior Citizen Card" or "JoyYou Card"[](javascript:)

results.title: 香港觀光電車遊- 旅程細節
results.content: 「電車全景遊」穿梭於港島鬧市中心，讓您盡覽醉人景色。車上提供16種不同語言（廣東話、普通話、英語、韓語、日語、西班牙語、法語、俄語、菲律賓語、印尼語、印度語、義大利
